contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Repo-class guardrails: API-only data repos (never clone) + beta-first prod enforcement for Sophia and all LLM agents
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/99
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/295
  
  Details:
  Full TrueSightDAO org audit (56 repos) producing a three-class repo policy, enforced in code and documented for every agent. (1) Thirteen machine-owned data repos classified API-only — treasury-cache, places-cache, contributors-cache, truesight_autopilot_transcript, oracle_logs, lineage-credentials, lineage-assets, ecosystem_change_logs, .github, qr_codes, sunmint, store_interaction_attachments, agroverse-inventory — agents must never git-clone or branch-edit them; reads via raw URLs / Contents API, sanctioned writes via single-file PAT commits only. (2) Beta-first production enforcement: Sophia had been pushing directly to agroverse_shop_prod / truesight_me_prod / dapp_prod; git_push_changes, open_fix_pr and merge_pr now refuse all *_prod repos in code, and a new sync_beta_to_prod tool (GitHub merge-upstream fork sync — no clone, never force, 409 conflict escalates because prod/beta CNAME divergence is intentional) is the only promotion path, gated on explicit governor approval after reviewing the live beta deploy. (3) Prompt gains a REPO CLASSES section; GITHUB_AGENTIC_AI_SSH.md gains the audit table and both policies for non-Sophia LLMs. Deployed to the Sophia box and verified live: both guards fire, sync tool registered, service active. PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/99 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/295
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
